form.formComment: Last start favourite; won by a nose at Moulins April 9 over 2400m on a rain affected track defeating Riyak carrying 60.5kg at $4.30. The race before that favourite; came from midfield and won by 2 len at Compiegne March 27 over 2400m on a soft track defeating Moro carrying 56.5kg at $4.30. Best form should see him measure right up.
